title: Databayt Quiet Wizard — Step Catalog
description: Documentation-style catalog of every step the wrappers run. Source of truth for what each platform installer asks/does. Target shape: 2 dialogs in Act 1, 0 dialogs in Act 3, exactly 1 unavoidable browser click (GitHub device-flow Authorize).

act1_preflight.description: Two dialogs — everything else is auto-detected or deferred.

steps.prompt: Identity card — confirm your git identity and role.

rendering.mac: two chained osascript display dialogs (name/email autofill skips dialog if git config set) + choose-from-list for role
rendering.linux: zenity --forms (single dialog with 3 fields) / kdialog menu / TUI fallback

steps.skipWhen: All three values present in state file or auto-detectable

steps.prompt: Set up hogwarts local dev now? (pnpm + DB seed + build, ~10 min)

act2_silentBatch.description: Run the 8-phase platform backend in --quiet/-Quiet mode. One unavoidable click during Phase 3 (GitHub device-flow Authorize) — the script auto-opens the page and copies the code to clipboard.

phases.label: System Foundation — build tools, git, Node 22, pnpm, gh CLI
GitHub — SSH key, gh auth (device-flow: 1 Authorize click), upload key
Claude — Code CLI + Desktop (Mac/Win) + VS Code extension
Kun Engine — setup.sh + secrets.sh (if Gist supplied)
Hogwarts — pnpm install, prisma, seed, build (hogwartsDev only)

act2_silentBatch.progressMarker: PROGRESS:N/8:label streamed on stderr — wrappers parse for native notifications

act3_done.description: No dialogs. Final 'All set' panel lists optional follow-ups with exact commands the user can run later.

optionalFollowUps.label: Install Claude Code plugin in WebStorm
Enable Desktop computer-use
optionalFollowUps.command: Claude Desktop → Settings → General → 'Allow Claude to use your computer'

removedFromV1.description: Dialogs cut in v2 (down from 11 questions + 3 clicks to 2 questions + 1 click).

preflightCut.reason: Consent implied by curl|bash. Stderr 'Press Ctrl+C to abort' replaces dialog.
gh auth status answers; signup is inline on the device-flow page.
Claude CLI first-run / Desktop sign-in handles account creation.
Default $HOME; --repos-dir flag for the 1% who need a custom dir.
Deferred — surfaced as a copy-paste one-liner in the final panel.
Cut — final panel lists Desktop steps regardless; users skip what doesn't apply.

act3DialogsCut.reason: Moved to final-panel follow-up list. No longer blocks.
Niche power-user toggle. Moved to follow-up list.
Moved to follow-up list (silent install via JetBrains CLI is a future stretch).

stateFile.behavior: On wizard start, read state file. If present, skip already-answered fields and resume from last completed phase.

githubDeviceFlow.all: https://github.com/login/device  — auto-opened, code auto-copied to clipboard
